description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a white frame and a light wood back panel. The interior is divided into multiple horizontal shelves, with some vertical dividers creating separate compartments. On the right side, there is a unique spiral or curved metal rack, possibly for hanging or organizing items such as ties, belts, or scarves. The top and sides are solid, while the front is open for easy access to the shelves and compartments. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in a closet, garage, or storage room.
description: A tall, white shelving unit with multiple compartments and a curved metal rack on the right side, featuring a light wood back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, vertical dividers, and a curved metal rack on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the depth of the unit and the side profile of the shelves and rack.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid light wood back panel with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid side panel and the depth of the shelving unit.
